untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Price decline >= 1.5 standard deviations below 15-day moving average — requires standard deviation calculation not in allowed indicators; (2) Volume on down days >= 125% of 15-day average volume — requires conditional volume averaging (down days only) not expressible with allowed operators; (3) MACD histogram reversal — requires directional change detection not supported by allowed operators; (4) 15-day moving average is not in allowed list (only sma_5, sma_10, sma_20, sma_40, sma_50, sma_80, sma_100, sma_200 available)
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using closest available indicators: substituted sma_20 approximation for 15-day MA, used vol_ratio_20 as proxy for volume threshold, used rsi_14 < 35 for oversold condition. However, the core statistical conditions (standard deviation bands, conditional volume filtering, MACD reversal confirmation) cannot be reliably expressed with the constrained operator set and indicator list.
